steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Distribute both sides of the equation. Left side: $36(x-1) = 36x - 36$. Right side: $4(-9+9x) = -36 + 36x$. The equation becomes $$36x - 36 = 36x - 36$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Subtract $36x$ from both sides: $-36 = -36$. This is always true regardless of $x$, so every real number is a solution — the equation has infinitely many solutions.
